best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_mandantin
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names following 'Mandantin, Frau' or 'Mandant, Herr' patterns common in legal letters.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_nachname_wie_bf
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names following the specific legal context marker '(Nachname wie Bf.)'. This handles cases where the name is explicitly listed after this marker.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_children_context
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names following 'für die Kinder' or 'Kinder' in a list context, capturing the full name without assuming a title.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_direct_context
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names directly following 'in der Beschwerdesache' or 'Beschwerde der/des'. Captures the full name including any title (e.g., OSR, Prof.in). Strictly stops at comma to avoid capturing addresses.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_frau_herr
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts full names following 'Frau' or 'Herr'. Captures first and last name, and optional suffixes.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_kinship
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names following kinship terms like 'Gattin' (wife) or 'Ehemann' (husband).

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_role_context
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names following specific legal roles like 'durch den Richter' or 'durch die Richterin'. Requires full name (first + last) to avoid partial title matches.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_title_complex
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names with titles. Captures the full title and name as one entity. Handles multiple titles and stops before commas or addresses.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_context
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names following specific legal context markers. Excludes organization prefixes like 'Verein', 'Klub', 'GmbH' to avoid false positives.

best_rules_serialized.name: extract_german_legal_person_generic
best_rules_serialized.description: Extracts person names in generic legal contexts where no title is present, such as after 'Versicherungsnehmer' or 'Bf'.
